case_title: CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. VS. PREPRESS, INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PREPRESS, INC. $78,550.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,682.87 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $83,682.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $2,063.41 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 100032489) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PREPRESS, INC.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100091236) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PREPRESS, INC.

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PREPRESS, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100031308) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. SERVED JAN-24-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PREPRESS, INC. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON FEB-26-2018 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PREPRESS, INC.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION OCT-24-2018 - DISCHARGED WITHOUT COSTS PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT LOCAL RULE 8.9E AS TO EXAMINEE CHARLES CUNNINHAM, CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER FOR DEFENDANT PREPRESS, INC. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO APPEARANCES. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: ERIC R. FLEMING. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED CHARLES CUNNINGHAM, CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER OF PREPRESS, INC. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PREPRESS, INC. OEX HEARING SET FOR AUG-08-2018 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514
DECLARATION OF MARY ANN ROUSSO RE ACCRUED INTEREST ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PREPRESS, INC.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION AUG-08-2018 - DISCHARGED WITHOUT COSTS PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT LOCAL RULE 8.9E AS TO EXAMINEE CHARLES CUNNINGHAM, CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER FOR DEFENDANT PREPRESS, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CANON FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. DAVID S. ZALOB, ESQ. APPEARED WITH EXAMINEE CHARLES CUNNINGHAM, CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER FOR DEFENDANT PREPRESS, INC. NO PROOF OF SERVICE OF OEX ON FILE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
